task_updates.executor_notes: Wired admin payout caps into `main.py` by adding `_bind_cap_breach_dm(bot, logger)`, reading `ADMIN_PAYOUT_PER_PAYMENT_USD_CAP` and `ADMIN_PAYOUT_DAILY_USD_CAP`, and passing `per_payment_usd_cap`, `daily_usd_cap`, `capped_providers=('solana_payouts',)`, and `on_cap_breach=_bind_cap_breach_dm(bot, logger)` into `PaymentService(...)`. Added a startup `logger.info` recording the effective caps. task_updates.executor_notes: Before editing, `rg -n "amount_usd" tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_social_publish_service.py` showed the existing `amount_usd is None` assertions at `tests/test_admin_payments.py:524` and `:707` using uncapped provider `solana`, and `tests/test_social_publish_service.py:496` using uncapped `solana_native` in an `is_test=True` path. Extended the fake DB scaffolding additively in both test modules: `FakeIntentDB`, `FakePaymentRequestDB`, and `FakePaymentDB` now expose `has_active_payment_or_intent`, `get_rolling_24h_payout_usd`, and wallet-upsert blocking support using `WalletUpdateBlockedError`; `FakePaymentProvider` now tracks `price_calls`; and `tests/conftest.py` adds a shared env-clearing fixture for the new cap/DM settings. Added the fail-to-pass regression tests for null-recipient confirmation rejection and privileged override, per-payment and rolling cap holds, derived-USD persistence, missing-price fail-closed behavior, uncapped-provider preservation, idempotency/collision branches, both wallet-blocked caller paths (admin_chat and grants), admin success DM thresholding and derived-USD formatting, stored-wallet execution, and initiate_payment wallet-arg rejection. Verified with `python -m py_compile main.py tests/conftest.py tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_social_publish_service.py` and `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_admin_payments.py tests/test_social_publish_service.py tests/test_scheduler.py` (`55 passed, 1 warning`).

sense_check_acknowledgments.acknowledgment: Verified `main.py` now passes `per_payment_usd_cap`, `daily_usd_cap`, `capped_providers=('solana_payouts',)`, and an `_bind_cap_breach_dm(bot, logger)` closure into `PaymentService(...)`, logs the effective caps at startup, and leaves `src/features/payments/payment_cog.py:setup()` untouched.

Verified the inline fake DBs in both `tests/test_admin_payments.py` and `tests/test_social_publish_service.py` were extended additively with `has_active_payment_or_intent`, `get_rolling_24h_payout_usd`, and `WalletUpdateBlockedError`-aware upsert support; the pre-edit `amount_usd` grep showed only uncapped `solana` / `solana_native` assertions; all required fail-to-pass tests are present including the four persistence/wiring pins; and the wallet-blocked coverage exercises both admin_chat and grants callers.
